feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Last Hope of the Alphas
entry.summary:
Author: NEVERLANDWONDERLAND

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,849Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 709

Summary: Stiles is magical, being trained for years and finally getting a promotion on his first mission alone. Peter Hale, Deucalion and Chris Argent are 3 dangerous and powerful alphas who were betrayed in the past and now don't have a pack.The high magical council considered their respective crimes as a consequence of this loss of control and that is why they need to be rehabilitated but their scars are very deep and they have not suffered any progress for years. The council decided to give them their last chance after killing their last caregivers, failure would result in death. Stiles, a druid with powers beyond his own understanding, is these Alphas' last hope.

entry.title: Run Boy Run
entry.summary:
Author: myswordhandissinging

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,541Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 857

Summary: Stiles Stilinski knew he should have stayed in to finish his assignment that was due on Monday. Instead, he had to go investigate with the pack. He knew he was going to regret it later, and he probably should have listened to his instincts. When he goes missing, the pack finds him in the same spot after days of searching.   Or the one where Stiles goes missing for a couple of days and comes back blind and with magical powers. What did that bitch do to him?   *This was first published in 2013 as a teenager. Now, as an adult with a developed frontal lobe, the age difference between Derek and Stiles is only 2 years, with Stiles as an 18-year-old high school senior and Derek being 20-years-old.

entry.title: Stiles is a Winchster
entry.summary:
Author: TacosBeforeMuchachos

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,347Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 411

Summary: *Originally from Wattpad, updates there first (same account name)After being possessed by the nogitsune, Stiles falls into a depression and is consumed by guilt over the friends he's lost.In the world of the supernatural, there must be a way to get them back... that's when he finds out about crossroads demons.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski´s Guide to Derek Hale´s Heart
entry.summary:
Author: tellmewhy4

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,476Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 773

Summary: Derek just wants to relax after a particularly bad fight. After the pack members headed home, he is ready to go to his safe place. Stiles Stilinski chooses that moment to come and search for his laptop.Things begin there.Scott ships it. In fact, everyone does.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,975Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 714

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,227Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,906Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 178

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Rake
entry.summary:
Author: Vampire_Finch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,601Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 165

Summary: Au Regency Romance 1820 England. Explicit M/M sex scenes. Viscount Derek Hale has a notorious reputation as a dallier, a trifler, a breaker of Omega hearts and tarnisher of reputatiions, yet devishly handsome, charming and good -natured he is adored by London society. He is the type of aristocratic Alpha young Omega dabeutantes are warned to avoid at all costs. Stiles Stilinski is the 16 year old Omega son of Baron Noah Stilinski and his wife, Claudia. Taken to London for his debut into The Season and make a 'perfect match', Stiles is strenuously warned against any association with Viscount Hale by his cousin and Mother. Accepted into The Ton, Stiles inevitably meets Viscount Hale and more than sparks fly. Can Stiles preserve his and his family's reputation and tame a wild heart or become another notch on the Viscount's bedpost?

entry.title: Rip My Ribcage Open (And Devour What Is Truly Yours)
entry.summary:
Author: Welsh_Woman

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,198Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 233

Summary: After so many years of fighting all the strange shit that Beacon Hills throws at them, the McCall Pack are a little leery when they are visited by a Pack that claims they're there to help them become more of a team, more of a family... When the Hale Pack arrive and speak of a long standing claim to the Beacon Hills territory, Scott is instantly suspicious and combative, but Stiles wants to know who these newcomers are and what they can share. And why he feels so drawn to their Alpha, to a man that seems to be just as entranced by Stiles, despite the fact that he holds a secret that might topple the fraught bonds the McCall Pack share.

entry.title: Will the Truth Prevail
entry.summary:
Author: Angelic_Magician3

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,149Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Jack brings back everyone who didn't need to die after the final fight with Chuck, but without knowing the whole truth, this sparks an abundance of problems. People like Bobby, Charlie, and Castiel are brought back, but so are people like Mary and John. Ultimately, Dean is portrayed as the villain, and he loses everyone he has ever loved or even hated. Not only did close family refuse to talk or let him explain, but so did people he hadn't talked to in years. He lost everything but found something with his surrogate daughter, Mary, who needed him just as much as he needed her.The last thing he expects after a year of radio is everyone he thought he lost at the bunker's doors asking for his help.

entry.title: The Son of the Owl
entry.summary:
Author: XxJoyxX (DJRG686868)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,442Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: What if Stiles Stilinski wasn’t quite so human as the pack thought, what happens when Stiles Stilinski gets pushed out of Scott’s pack after the Nogitsune and decides to head back to camp? Stiles ends up going back to camp after being pushed out of his brothers pack, he leaves in the middle of the night. Watch as the pack struggles to find out where he’s gone, and what happens after he returns.

entry.title: Ragnarök
entry.summary:
Author: ahhhnorealnamesallowed

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,780Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Ragnarök was a fitting title for Stiles, Derek quickly determined. He had been hesitant to share the fate of his father with Stiles, but rather than shatter under the weight like Derek himself had done with the loss of his pack, Stiles blazed brighter still with fury, grief-stench crushed under the miasma of righteous anger and steely determination.It was Stiles, still naked and covered in dried blood and spend, Derek's seed still soaked inside him, that hefted his father's blade and called forth the Fimbulwinter and the first snow in Derek's lifetime, or in the lifetime of anyone in his pack's histories, since they first set foot in these parts. It was Stiles that offered Derek the opportunity to hunt, to seek revenge for his captivity and vengeance for the death of his pack.A spin-off sequel to Renmackree's Solstice

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,664,589Chapters: 47/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.title: move fast and break things
entry.summary:
Author: foolish_mortal

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 445Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: UX wants them to wire up a new interface for a demo they've pushed up to Monday morning, and several product managers, who don't know the first thing about code, have convinced each other this will take no more than half an hour before messaging him asking for updates. There goes his Friday night and most of his Saturday. Fuck his life. "How many shots of espresso are you legally allowed to give me?" Stiles asks the barista behind the counter and watches his menacing eyebrows draw together in a dark line. (not really a Coffee Shop AU)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Last time I saw him... was definitely the time I saw him last
entry.summary:
Author: fischl_irl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,666Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 66

Summary: It’s something he tries not to think about. Like most of the traumatic events in his life, it’s buried deep in the back of his mind. He only brings it out to pick at it anxiously in the dead of the night, unable to sleep out of the overwhelming fear that something might happen to his father while he’s unconscious. In the middle of the night, the moon hanging high in his bedroom window, he picks. Thinks about her. Thinks about the life he could’ve had if it weren’t for his poor mother losing her mind. Thinks about how the disease is hereditary. Thinks about how long it’d take for him to succumb, to end up like her. But there’s one part about the whole ordeal that he doesn’t dare think about. A part that he feels if he so much as ponders, his father will wail. He tells himself he made it up, that it didn’t really happen. He tells himself over and over again. Stiles Stilinski never had a brother. ----- a teen wolf x maze runner crossover fic in which stiles and thomas are long-lost twin brothers.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,280Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 115

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

entry.title: A Sense of Déjà Vu
entry.summary:
Author: Chaos_Crew

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,965Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 84

Summary: Seventeen years ago the Hale Pack of Beacon Hills disappears without a trace after a house fire leaving the town to believe they had all suffered the same fate as the family fifteen years prior. Hearing the news of the house fire along with the weird accounts of "freak accidents" the Winchesters and Co. head to Beacon Hills to investigate. A few hours shortly after arriving a dog with to much human like qualities leads Dean to a baby abandoned in an alley. Seventeen years later that baby has grown a lot and is starting to witness the oddities of the towns supernatural accidently ending up back in time to the point where the Hale Pack is starting to find their footing after years of butting heads.
